Apply codemods for safe DRIFT-T001/T002/T003 token-bypass findings; emit precise suggestions for DRIFT-T004 (deprecated tokens) and all DRIFT-P* (primitive adoption). FIX half of design-pipeline sub-project

- classify: Per-finding pre-flight check decides safe-codemod vs suggestion
- apply: Write codemods for safe T001/T002/T003; emit suggestions for everything else
- report: Emit FixOutcome[] + aggregate summary; write pipeline.fixesApplied in pipeline mode
